zh.Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massach: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorcas Baston於1676年出生在美國緬因州約克威爾斯時，她的父親Thomas Baston29歲，母親Hannah Cloyes24歲。她於1700年1月30日與Samuel Stuart在美國緬因州約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯被列為schoolmistress。她去世於1752年3月11日在她的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorcas Baston于1676年出生在美国缅因州約克威爾斯时，她的父亲Thomas Baston29岁，母亲Hannah Cloyes24岁。她于1700年1月30日与Samuel Stuart在美国缅因州約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯被列为schoolmistress。她去世于1752年3月11日在她的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andree, Almira, Pierre.

French and English (of Norman origin): from Old French bastun ‘stick’, used as a nickname for a dignitary who carried a staff as part of his function, or perhaps for an officious person, or someone who walked with the aid of a stick.
English: habitational name from Baston in Lincolnshire, named with the Old Norse personal name Bak + Old English tūn ‘farmstead’.

variants.name: Bastone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Ettore, Cesare, Pasquale, Pietro, Santo, Vincenzo.
Italian: metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of staffs and sticks, or a nickname for a thin or rigid-looking person, from bastone ‘stick’.

variants.name: Baton
meanings: French (Bâton): nickname from bâton (Old French bastun) ‘stick’; see Baston 1.
English and Scottish: variant of   Batten  .
History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Dorcas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek dorkas ‘doe, gazelle’. It was not used as a personal name by the ancient Greeks, but is offered in the Bible as an interpretation of the Aramaic name Tabitha (Acts 9:36), and was taken up by the early Christians. It was much used among the Puritans in the 16th century, and has remained in occasional use ever since, having also been used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Deòiridh .

en.lifeSummary: When Dorcas Baston was born in 1676, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, her father, Thomas Baston, was 29 and her mother, Hannah Cloyes, was 24. She married Samuel Stuart on 30 January 1700, in Wells, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. Her occupation is listed as schoolmistress in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. She died on 11 March 1752, in her hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorcas Baston est née en 1676, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Baston, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Hannah Cloyes, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Stuart le 30 janvier 1700, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. La profession de sa indiquée est schoolmistress à Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1752, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Januar 1700 in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Samuel Stuart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ihr Beruf ist als schoolmistress in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Sie starb am 11. März 1752 im Alter von 76 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorcas Baston è nata il nel 1676 nel Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Thomas Baston, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Hannah Cloyes, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Stuart il 30 gennaio 1700, nel Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come schoolmistress nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 11 marzo 1752, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorcas Bastonが1676年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで生まれた時，父Thomas Bastonは29歳，母Hannah Cloyesは24歳であった。1700年1月30日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズでSamuel Stuartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズでの職業はschoolmistressと記録されている。彼女は1752年3月11日に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massach: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 프리포트 데세르트 프 맹
ko.lifeSummary: Dorcas Baston(이)가 1676년 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Baston(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Cloyes(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1700년 1월 30일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 Samuel Stuart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 schoolmistress이었다. 그녀는 1752년 3월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorcas Baston nasceu em 1676, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Baston, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Cloyes, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Stuart em 30 de janeiro de 1700, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como schoolmistress em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1752, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massach: десирт оф меин, фрипорт, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorcas Baston родилась в 1676 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Thomas Baston было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Cloyes, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Stuart 30 января 1700 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь.  Она работала по профессии schoolmistress в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она умерла 11 марта 1752 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorcas Baston nació en 1676, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Baston, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Hannah Cloyes, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Samuel Stuart el 30 de enero de 1700, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era schoolmistress en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1752, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
